form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 2nd in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather on April 6 over 1900m, 2.25 len behind Secerhan with 59kg at $3.30. The race before that won by 9 len at Sirinyer All Weather March 26 over 1600m defeating Ruzgar Baris with 58.5kg at $1.70. One of the prime contenders in a most suitable contest.
